title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 362.1020 - Inapplicability of certain sections, when
text:
362.1020.  Inapplicability of certain sections, when. — If a family trust company limits its activities to the activities authorized under sections 362.1010 to 362.1117, then section 361.160 and sections 362.010 to 362.950 shall not apply to the family trust company.
(L. 2017 H.B. 292)
